parts.text:
I apologize for the continued trouble with scheduling. It seems I made an error with the timezone. Switzerland observes Central European Summer Time (CEST) in April, which is UTC+2. I was mistakenly using UTC+1.

Let me correct this and check for availability for an online pension meeting during the week of April 8th, around 2 PM (14:00). I'll check for Monday, April 8th, to Wednesday, April 10th.
